# External Datasets for Comparison

Previously published data and results we can compare our results against.


| PMID     | Data Link | SampleType | Reps | fastq | Count Matrix | TADs | Loops | Compartments | Paper |
| 30545851 | [synapse](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn12979149) | NPC,Glia,Neuron | 3 | [x]   | [x]          | [x]  | [x]   | [ ]          | [Neuron-specific signatures in the chromosomal connectome associated with schizophrenia risk](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6408958/#SM1) |
| 37090552 | [GEO Query](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE228118) | Gluta Neurons | 3 | [ ] | [x] | [ ]  | [x]   | [ ]          | [MAPT expression is mediated by long-range interactions with cis-regulatory elements](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10120716/) |
| 37811875 | [synapse](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn26164834) | human fetal brain | 2-3 | [ ]   | [ ]          | [x]  | [x]   | [x]          | [Lineage specific 3D genome structure in the adult human brain and neurodevelopmental changes in the chromatin interactome](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10639075/) | |  
| [3Dchromatin](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn22035669/tables/#query/eyJzcWwiOiJTRUxFQ1QgKiBGUk9NIHN5bjIyMDM1NjY5IiwgImluY2x1ZGVFbnRpdHlFdGFnIjp0cnVlLCAibGltaXQiOjEwMH0=) | dorsolateral prefrontal cortex | 2-3 | [ ]   | [ ]          | [x]  | [x]   | [x]          | []() |
| 34172755 | [synapse](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn22035669/tables/) | | 2 reps | [ ]   | [ ]          | [ ]  | [ ]   | [ ]          | [Neuronal and glial 3D chromatin architecture informs the cellular etiology of brain disorders](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC8233376/) |
|  |           |            |      | [ ]   | [ ]          | [ ]  | [ ]   | [ ]          | []() |
|  |           |            |      | [ ]   | [ ]          | [ ]  | [ ]   | [ ]          | []() |
| 41310180 |           |            |      | [ ]   | [ ]          | [ ]  | [ ]   | [ ]          | [3D genetic architecture of schizophrenia risk across three neuronal subtypes](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12999511/) |

[CNON](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn15592963) 
[Neuron-specific Signatures in the Chromosomal Connectome](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn13363580/tables/#) 2 .hic files
[DopaModel](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn21818658/tables/#) 14 paired-ed fastq files for HiC + metadata
